column1: # Cape Girardeau County MOSWIN talkgroup labels.
# Source of the seed entries: RadioReference public wiki
# plus the MOSWIN forum talkgroup threads (2024-2026).
# !!! VERIFY against your own RadioReference account / live listening !!!
# Some assignments are unconfirmed or have changed over time (e.g. the
# Sheriff vs Jackson PD split on 4229/4237). This file is the source of
# truth for labels — edit it freely, then regenerate the playlist aliases:
# Any talkgroup NOT listed here still records/streams and shows as its bare
# number (the catch-all "Cape County All" alias). Add rows as you identify them.
# group is one of: Fire EMS Police Interop Local  (drives the color; free text ok)
